brief_summary: Exploded vertical stack of the build, top to bottom: GMK Striker R3 keycaps → 70× Oil King switches (bordeaux-filled, the focal layer) → polycarbonate plate → silicone leaf gasket (bordeaux strip) → PE foam → PCB with Staebies V3 → Poron foam → Mode Sonnet aluminum case. Right-margin contribution callouts ('supplies the weight', 'absorbs the sharpness'); left-margin balance callouts. Caption: 'plate absorbs the sharpness · switch supplies the weight'.
data_sources: building-mode-sonnet-with-oil-kings.mdx § 'Why this pairing' — 'The plate absorbs the sharpness; the switch supplies the weight ... the whole stack stops fighting itself.'

building-mode-sonnet-with-oil-kings.mdx § 'Build details' Callout — full layer-by-layer parts list: 1.5mm polycarbonate plate, Staebies V3 stabs, PE foam between plate and PCB, 2mm Poron under PCB, skipped case foam, GMK Striker R3 keycaps, 70× Oil King
